title: Daemonorops calicarpa
taxonomy: Daemonorops calicarpa belongs to the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. This species is a type of palm tree found in Southeast Asia. Daemonorops calicarpa is a genus of palms that are often referred to as rattan palms due to their flexible stems. The classification of Daemonorops calicarpa is further divided into several species, with Daemonorops calicarpa being one of them. Daemonorops calicarpa is also known to be a member of the order Arecales.
